name: example-hps-academic-paper
title: Academic Paper
description: LaTeX-paper deck theme: paper-white #fdfcf8 ground, all-serif type (Latin Modern Roman with Playfair Display fallback), ink-black body, link-blue #1a3a7a underlined citation anchors, italic kickers, zero radius and near-zero shadow, double-rule title page, numbered Figure/Table captions and booktabs three-line tables. Single-file HTML deck with keyboard navigation and hash deep links — for conference talks, thesis defenses, research reviews and journal clubs. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill academic-paper.

description_i18n.en: LaTeX-paper deck theme: paper-white #fdfcf8 ground, all-serif type (Latin Modern Roman with Playfair Display fallback), ink-black body, link-blue #1a3a7a underlined citation anchors, italic kickers, zero radius and near-zero shadow, double-rule title page, numbered Figure/Table captions and booktabs three-line tables. Single-file HTML deck with keyboard navigation and hash deep links — for conference talks, thesis defenses, research reviews and journal clubs. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill academic-paper.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 「学术论文风」幻灯片主题：纸白 #fdfcf8 底色全衬线排印（Latin Modern Roman，Playfair Display 兜底），墨黑正文 + 链接蓝 #1a3a7a 下划线引用锚点 + 斜体 kicker，零圆角近零阴影，双规则线扉页、带编号的 Figure/Table 图注与 booktabs 三线表。零依赖单文件 HTML，键盘导航 + hash 直达——适合学术会议报告、论文答辩、研究评审与组会分享。移植自 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 academic-paper 主题。

query.en: Create an Academic Paper deck about {{topic}} for {{audience}} ({{slideCount}}, {{density}}): a conference-talk presentation in the locked academic-paper theme from lewislulu/html-ppt-skill. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies — all CSS/JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries, no CDN scripts, no remote images; only Google Fonts @import (Playfair Display incl. italics, Noto Serif SC, JetBrains Mono) is allowed. THEME IS LOCKED — reproduce exactly: (a) Tokens: --bg:#fdfcf8; --bg-soft:#f7f5ed; --surface:#ffffff; --surface-2:#f5f3ea; --border:rgba(20,20,20,.14); --border-strong:rgba(20,20,20,.35); --text-1:#0a0a0a; --text-2:#333333; --text-3:#707070; --accent:#1a3a7a (link blue — citations, 'ours' data, best numbers); --accent-2:#0a0a0a (ink); --accent-3:#8a1a1a (sparing dark red, errata/negative only); --good:#1a5a2a; --warn:#8a6a1a; --bad:#8a1a1a; --grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a3a7a,#0a0a0a); --grad-soft:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8edf8,#f5f3ea); --radius/--radius-sm/--radius-lg:0px; --shadow:none; --shadow-lg:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.1); all three font slots serif: 'Latin Modern Roman','Playfair Display','Noto Serif SC',Georgia,serif; --font-mono:'JetBrains Mono'; --letter-tight:-.01em; --letter-normal:0; --ease:cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1). Zero rounded corners, no shadows, no colors outside this palette. (b) Typographic register: headings weight 700 sentence case (never uppercase), body 400 line-height 1.6, .kicker is the signature — italic, link blue, sentence case, letter-spacing 0, weight 400; links and [n] .cite anchors are link-blue underlined; tabular-nums for all data. (c) Academic devices on the right pages: .rule-double LaTeX titlepage double rule on the cover; .abstract italic block between hairline rules with a bold lead word; numbered captions on EVERY figure and table (.figure/.figcaption 'Figure 1: …', booktabs 'Table 1: …'); .booktabs three-line tables (2px top/bottom, 1px header rule, never vertical rules, .best winners bold blue); .footnote dagger small print under a hairline rule; .references hanging-[n] bibliography on the closing page. (d) Slide system: <div class="deck" id="deck"> horizontal scroll-snap strip of <section class="slide" data-title="…">, each exactly 100vw×100vh (16:9, 1280×720 baseline, clamp() fluid type), padding 72px 96px, one screen per slide, no internal scrolling; fixed chrome .deck-header (italic running head) / .deck-footer (attribution + N/total counter) / 2px link-blue .progress-bar. (e) Navigation: keep the seed script verbatim — arrows/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End, #/N hash routing via history.replaceState in try/catch, dual capture-phase key listeners with Event-identity dedupe, scroll sync, body auto-focus; this variant is theme-locked with no T cycling. (f) Visuals: diagrams are ink-line inline SVG (1.5px strokes, serif labels, 'ours' boxes tinted #e8edf8/link blue); charts are pure CSS bars on a heavy ink axis — muted --surface-2 baselines and exactly one link-blue 'ours' bar; no Chart.js/mermaid, no external images, icons inline SVG only. (g) Layout masters to compose from (all in example.html): double-rule title page with superscript author affiliations, .toc-list numbered outline, ghost-numeral section divider, abstract+contributions two-column, giant link-blue stat with CI footnote, SVG method figure, CSS results bar chart, booktabs comparison table, italic epigraph quote with precise attribution, two-card conclusions, references closer. (h) Motion restraint: at most one rise/fade hero plus one stagger list per slide — no 3D, no glitch, no confetti. Write real content with real numbers and plausibly formatted citations — no lorem ipsum; 1–3 sentences of speaker notes per slide in a hidden .notes div. Start from the example.html seed shipped in this plugin: keep its token sheet, base CSS, academic device classes, chrome and navigation script verbatim; replace only the slide content. Do not introduce any color or font outside this specification and do not redesign the theme.
query.zh-CN: 用「学术论文风 Academic Paper」主题为 {{audience}} 创作一套关于 {{topic}} 的学术报告（{{slideCount}}，{{density}}）：LaTeX 论文质感——纸白 #fdfcf8 底全衬线（Latin Modern Roman / Playfair Display 兜底），墨黑正文 + 链接蓝 #1a3a7a 下划线引用锚点 + 斜体 kicker，零圆角近零阴影；封面双规则线扉页，每个图表必须带编号图注（Figure 1 / Table 1），表格用 booktabs 三线表，结尾页悬挂 [n] 参考文献。零依赖单文件 HTML：横向 scroll-snap 的 section.slide 一屏一页，键盘翻页 + #/N hash 直达，图示用墨线 inline SVG、图表用纯 CSS 条形图（唯一一根链接蓝 'ours' 柱），动效克制。从插件内 example.html 种子出发：保留全部设计 token、学术装置类、页面骨架和导航脚本，只替换内容；禁止引入规格之外的颜色和字体。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。

exampleOutputs.title: DAMC conference talk — Academic Paper deck

title_i18n.zh-CN: DAMC 学术会议报告 · 学术论文风

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: A paper, a thesis chapter, a research review, a journal-club pick…

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: Conference session, thesis committee, lab group, students…
